caption: A person wearing a black long-sleeved shirt uses both hands to handle a set of metal craft dies over a themed backdrop. The backdrop features a red banner at the top with the text "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE" and images of wintery scenes. The person holds a clear plastic package labeled "FROSTED FRAMES 5 DIES," which contains intricate, silver-colored metal cutting dies. As the sequence progresses, the person removes a rectangular frame die and a decorative floral-style die from the plastic sleeve, placing them on a black surface. To the right of the action, a product catalog is visible, showing images of other dies and text such as "FROSTED VOLUME." A watermark reading "Champagne" is visible in the bottom left corner. The action shifts from holding the packaged dies to carefully extracting and arranging them on the workspace.
